clerkConfig.missingKeyDescription: The app cannot load authentication because the publishable key is missing.
clerkConfig.stepCopy: Copy public-harasy/.env.example to .env.local (or .env) in the public-harasy folder.
clerkConfig.stepRestart: Restart the dev server (bun run dev) after saving.
clerkConfig.docsHint: Get your key from the Clerk Dashboard → API keys → Publishable key.
